name: Chilie Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Sharp Cheddar, Large Cubes (at room temperature)
recipeInstructions:
1. Squeeze the canned chopped green chilies between layers of paper towels to remove excess moisture. If you don't want to use green chilies, add about 1/2 teaspoon ground red pepper.
2. In a bread machine, pour in all ingredients except cheese and chilies (in the order listed or as your machine requires, if it takes wet ingredients first, reverse the order).
3. Select white bread setting and press "Start".
4. After the first knead at the beeps, add the chilies and cheddar cheese.
5. Brush the crust with margarine or butter before serving.
